purpose: Shared role vocabulary for managed local-worker workflow lanes.

roles.mission: Produce source-anchored candidate records from bounded inputs.
roles.supervisor_boundary: Supervisor defines inputs, schema, stop rules, and final acceptance.

roles.mission: Review candidate outputs against supplied source excerpts and identify defects.
roles.supervisor_boundary: Self-audit is cheap defect reduction, not validation.

roles.mission: Repair candidate records using only explicit audit findings and source excerpts.
roles.supervisor_boundary: Repairs remain candidates until supervisor audit or deterministic promotion rules accept them.

roles.mission: Compare iteration metrics and decide whether to continue, stop, escalate, or abandon.
roles.supervisor_boundary: Policy may stop or route work, but supervisor owns final acceptance and scale decisions.

roles.mission: Perform source-level audit, economics interpretation, and final accept/reject/scale decisions.
forbidden_actions: counting local self-audit as independent validation
claiming economics without measured token spans
closing GitHub workflow based only on worker prose
roles.supervisor_boundary: This is the nondelegable acceptance and accountability role.
